monumentality.normal: +1 Era Score each time you construct a new specialty District.
monumentality.golden: +2 Movement for Builders. Civilian units may be purchased with Faith, and Builders and Settlers are 30% cheaper.

pen_brush_and_voice.normal: +1 Era Score each time you trigger an Inspiration, and for constructing a building with a Great Work slot.
pen_brush_and_voice.golden: Inspirations provide an additional 10% of civic costs. Each city receives +1 Culture for each specialty district.

free_inquiry.normal: +1 Era Score each time you trigger a Eureka, and for constructing a building that yields Science.
free_inquiry.golden: Eurekas provide an additional 10% of technology costs. Commercial Hub and Harbor Gold adjacency also provides Science.

exodus_of_the_evangelists.normal: +2 Era Score each time you convert a city to your founded Religion for the first time.
exodus_of_the_evangelists.golden: +2 Movement and +2 Charges for Missionaries, Apostles and Inquisitors. +4 Great Prophet points per turn.

hic_sunt_dracones.normal: +3 Era Score for each new Continent or Natural Wonder discovered, +1 for each non-Barbarian naval unit killed.
hic_sunt_dracones.golden: +3 starting Population for cities on other continents. +2 Movement for naval and embarked units. +2 Loyalty per turn off the Capital's continent.

reform_the_coinage.normal: +1 Era Score each time you complete a Trade Route.
reform_the_coinage.golden: Traders cannot be plundered. International Trade Routes provide +3 Gold per specialty district in the destination city.

to_arms.normal: +1 Era Score per Corps kill and +2 per Army kill, against non-Barbarians.
to_arms.golden: A special Casus Belli with 75% less warmongering penalty, usable immediately after denouncing. +15% Production toward military units.

heartbeat_of_steam.normal: +2 Era Score for each Industrial or later building constructed.
heartbeat_of_steam.golden: +10% Production toward Industrial-era and later wonders. Campus Science adjacency also provides Production.

bodyguard_of_lies.normal: +1 Era Score for each successful offensive Spy operation.
bodyguard_of_lies.golden: Spies establish presence instantly, and all offensive missions take 25% less time.

sky_and_stars.normal: +1 Era Score per Aerodrome built, and each time a Great Person is earned or purchased.
sky_and_stars.golden: Unlocks the era's flight and rocketry Eurekas. +100% experience for all air units.

wish_you_were_here.normal: +1 Era Score for each Artifact extracted.
wish_you_were_here.golden: Cities with Governors receive +50% Tourism from World Wonders, and all National Parks +100% Tourism.

automaton_warfare.normal: +1 Era Score each time a Giant Death Robot kills a non-Barbarian unit.
automaton_warfare.golden: A Giant Death Robot in the Capital, 3 Uranium per turn, and Uranium mines accumulate +1 more per turn.
